description: Educator checks whether the latest revision implemented prior critique directions

templates.default:
You are auditing one revision step — not writing a full workshop critique.

Draft BEFORE the poet's last revision:
---
{prev_draft}
---

Draft AFTER that revision (current):
---
{current_draft}
---

Directions you gave (what the poet was asked to do):
---
{last_critique}
---

Answer in ≤120 words, four labeled lines only (no other prose):
STATUS: FULL | PARTIAL | NONE — did they implement the main directions?
MISSED: what was ignored or only weakly changed (or "none").
DONE: what clearly improved, with line or phrase evidence (or "unclear").
NOTE: one line on whether new problems were introduced.

Do not end with any approval phrase. Do not re-critique the whole poem.
